## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `bb ...`
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or logs if available.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.11]
- OpenClaw version: [e.g., 2026.2.24]
- Chalkboard version: [e.g., 2.2]

## Additional context

Any other relevant information (config snippets, screenshots, etc.).
